description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in black from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the textured leather effect fabric will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 30cmWidth: 40cmDepth: 17cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with one internal zipped pocket and organiser pouchesMedium length handles attached to the bag with bucklesMock zip on front and pocket with magnet fasteningZip pocket on backBag fabric gathered to sides at front and backCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
